name: Outback Goldfields Corp.
description: Outback Goldfields Corp., now operating as Valkea Resources Corp., is a Canada-based exploration mining company focused on discovering and advancing significant gold deposits within Finland's highly prospective Central Lapland Greenstone Belt (CLGB). The company maintains an extensive portfolio of high-potential projects, including its flagship Paana project, which is strategically located near major mining operations. By leveraging innovative exploration techniques and Finland's favorable regulatory and geological environment, the company aims to create long-term value for shareholders while adhering to responsible and sustainable exploration practices in one of the world's emerging gold districts.
